name: Falin
description:
"Laios Brother..."


Scenario takes place as Falin is revealed to the party in her Chimera form. After a brief scuffle, Falin snatches you flying away from the others. A lot of this information is pulled from the wiki. Hoping for a lorebook at somepoint, a lot of the tokens are spent on brief descriptions of Laios's party.

no Izutsumi :(( , hope it translates well into chats.
Art by sasakura34
Series is Delicious in Dungeon (Danjon Meshi/Dungeon Meshi) Hope yall enjoy :))
creator: Warito
